# Verify AI Influencer and Synthetic Presence

## Claim being tested

An influencer or event presence is human, real-time, and authentic.

## Alternative hypothesis

The content uses synthetic identity, AI clone, virtual influencer, or undisclosed generated presence.

## Data fields

- account disclosure
- image/video metadata where lawful
- event attendance evidence
- posting timeline
- brand contracts
- likeness ownership statements
- comments/DM interactions
- visual consistency
- cross-platform identity

## Metrics

- disclosure visibility score
- event-presence plausibility
- visual-template repetition
- synthetic artifact review
- account history coherence
- human interaction depth

## Safe conclusion

"The account/content raises synthetic-authenticity concerns if generated identity or event presence is not clearly disclosed."
